Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The WindowDepthStencilMode enumeration selects the depth and stencil buffer format requested when binding an IFrameBuffer directly to a window.

Note.Paragraph: Window depth and stencil formats are requests. A renderer may be constrained by the platform presentation API, driver, or operating system window system.

EnumMemberList.EnumMemberListEntry: Requests no depth or stencil buffer for the window framebuffer.
Requests a 16-bit unsigned normalized depth buffer.
Requests a 24-bit unsigned normalized depth buffer without stencil.
Requests a combined 24-bit unsigned normalized depth buffer and 8-bit unsigned integer stencil buffer.
Requests a 32-bit floating point depth buffer without stencil.
Requests a combined 32-bit floating point depth buffer and 8-bit unsigned integer stencil buffer.
